user.title: Voice Assistant Bridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant Assist to a voice-assistant service (https://github.com/maxmaxme/voice-assistant). HA's conversation agent slot will delegate to this service via POST /assist; STT and TTS in the pipeline are unaffected.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach voice-assistant at the given URL. Check that the service is running and /health returns 200.

abort.already_configured: This voice-assistant URL is already configured.
